The Kingdom of Disciplined Men

Most men drift. Few are forged. This is a 30-day intensive that rebuilds you into the disciplined husband, father, and leader your home was always waiting for.

The Drift Ends at the Gate

— I · The Kingdom
Answer the CallFrom surviving to reigning

Most men don't fall in a day. They drift — quietly, until the husband, the father, and the leader they meant to be is a stranger in his own home.

The Kingdom of Disciplined Men exists to end that drift. This is not soft motivation. It is a forge. We take driven men of faith and rebuild them from the inside out — their convictions, their marriage, their discipline, and their leadership at home.

Through a 30-day intensive, private one-on-one coaching, and a brotherhood walking the same road, Larry Beacham helps you become the man your family is waiting for — and the king your legacy demands.

"But seek ye first the kingdom of God, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you."Matthew 6:33
— II · The Code

What Every Disciplined Man Lives By

i.

Discipline

Do what must be done, on the days you don't feel like it. Discipline is the bridge between the man you are and the man you're called to be.

"He that hath no rule over his own spirit is like a city that is broken down, and without walls."Proverbs 25:28
ii.

Faith

Lead from conviction, not convenience. A man anchored in faith doesn't bend to every storm — he becomes the shelter his family stands under.

"For we walk by faith, not by sight."2 Corinthians 5:7
iii.

Family

Be present in the small moments, not just the big ones. Your wife should feel led, and your children should feel safe because you are home.

"As for me and my house, we will serve the Lord."Joshua 24:15
iv.

Brotherhood

No king reigns alone. Iron sharpens iron — and the men beside you will not let you drift back to who you used to be.

"Iron sharpeneth iron; so a man sharpeneth the countenance of his friend."Proverbs 27:17

Three Roads Into the Kingdom

— III · The Path
Flagship
No. I · The 30-Day Intensive

The Kingdom of Disciplined Men

Total immersion. A daily, structured transformation that rewires how you lead yourself, your wife, and your children — in just one month.

The Man at the Gate

— IV · Your Coach
Larry BeachamFounder · Head Coach

From Champion Builder toBuilder of Disciplined Men

For years, Larry Beacham coached people to win in business — earning the name "The Champion Builder." But the transformation he kept seeing run deepest wasn't in bank accounts. It was in marriages, in fatherhood, and in men who finally stepped up at home.

So he turned that same relentless intensity toward the work that matters most. Today, from Tampa, Florida, Larry leads men through a 30-day forge built on discipline, faith, and accountability — calling them to be present husbands, intentional fathers, and steady leaders.

Tampa, FLFaith-Centered Marriage & FatherhoodAuthorSpeaker

"I don't build better men. I help men become who they were already built to be."

"Husbands, love your wives, even as Christ also loved the church, and gave himself for it."Ephesians 5:25

In the Arena

— On Stage & In the Trenches
— V · By His Side
Rolanda BeachamCo-Founder · "Ms. Ro"

The Heart of the HouseRolanda Beacham

Known to many in Central Florida simply as "Ms. Ro," Rolanda has spent more than a decade pouring into others — inspiring, encouraging, and empowering young women to live with confidence, purpose, and emotional freedom.

Her heart for ministry and community runs deep: she's served as an outreach coordinator at her Tampa church, helping organize efforts that connect people to second chances, hope, and dignity. That same spirit anchors the Kingdom — because a man's transformation is never his alone. It's felt most by the wife and family who walk it with him.

Youth MentorCommunity Outreach Faith & FamilyEncourager

"A disciplined man builds a home where his whole family can thrive."

"Strength and honour are her clothing; and she shall rejoice in time to come."Proverbs 31:25
